name: @spacemolt/client-v2
description: Typed CLI client for the SpaceMolt v2 REST API. Command registry and types are auto-generated from the live OpenAPI spec.

scripts.generate: bun run openapi-ts && bun run scripts/build-commands.ts
scripts.build:lib: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && bun run scripts/fix-dts-extensions.ts
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/main.ts --target bun --outfile dist/cli.js && bun run scripts/prepend-shebang.ts
scripts.pack:lib: bun run build:lib && bun run build:cli && bun pm pack
